segments.text: Sing to the Lord a new song, for he has done marvelous things; his right hand and his holy arm have worked salvation for him.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The Lord has made his salvation known and revealed his righteousness to the nations.
He has remembered his love and his faithfulness to Israel; all the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.
Shout for joy to the Lord, all the earth, burst into jubilant song with music;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: make music to the Lord with the harp, with the harp and the sound of singing,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: with trumpets and the blast of the ram's horn— shout for joy before the Lord, the King.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let the sea resound, and everything in it, the world, and all who live in it.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let the rivers clap their hands, let the mountains sing together for joy;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: let them sing before the Lord, for he comes to judge the earth. He will judge the world in righteousness and the peoples with equity.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
